ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages for the group (e.g., 18-24) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the age group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the age group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the age group is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "male_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of males in the age group */,
  "female_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of females in the age group */,
  "unknown_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with unknown gender in the age group */,
  "total_percentage" REAL /* Total percentage of the age group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the distribution record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the distribution record */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the distribution data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_distribution_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data record */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, census) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the data */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the demographic data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the demographic data record */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the region is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the data source is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data record */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_attributes_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data record the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data file */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the data file is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data record */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metadata record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)
